title: Coby Finds the Courage to Speak
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Luffy and Coby aboard Alvida’s ship, where Coby’s fear begins turning into a dream of his own.
scene: Luffy’s arrival disrupts Alvida’s ship and gives Coby the first real chance to say what he wants.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: N-NO WAY! JUST THINKING ABOUT WHAT ALVIDE WOULD DO TO ME IF SHE CAUGHT ME MAKES MY BLADDER WEAK...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I just can't risk it...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll NEVER forget that FATEFUL DAY... I just wanted to go fishing...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...AND I BOARDED A PIRATE SHIP BY MISTAKE.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THAT WAS TWO YEARS AGO. IN EXCHANGE FOR MY LIFE, I'VE BEEN WORKING AS THEIR CABIN BOY.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're kinda clumsy and dumb!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: and you're gutless too. You really are WORTHLESS!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You don't have to be THAT Frank...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: BUT YOU'RE RIGHT. I DON'T HAVE THE GUTS TO FLOAT AROUND AT SEA IN A BARRELL LIKE YOU...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy, WHY DID YOU GO TO SEA ANYWAY?

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Well, ya see...

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: I'm gonna be the KING of the DIRATCC...

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: I'm gonna be the

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: K-King of the Pirates!!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: but... you'd have to make the WHOLE WORLD <a href=" http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=D=D=D=D=Dkw=Dkw=Dkw=Dkw=Dkw=Dkw=Dkw=

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wealth, fame, power-- you'd have to achieve it all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me you're after Gold Roger's lost treasure, one piece

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Do you want to DIE!?

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: EVERY PIRATE IN THE WORLD IS AFTER THAT!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And so am I.

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: But the odds against you are ASTRO- NOMICAL!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: It's impossible!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You want to be the King of the Pirates in the Golden Age of piracy!!?

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: It'll never happen!!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Hey!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: W-WHY'D YOU HIIT ME!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: you were hysterical.

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Okay, I'm used to it.

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Heh heh heh heh heh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm not afraid to die, KOBY!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've set my self to become the king of the pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And if I die trying... then at least I tried!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: WHAT GUTS... WHAT DETERNATION!!

summary: Luffy’s confidence contrasts with Coby’s fear. The section is about Coby slowly realizing that his dream is possible once someone refuses to treat Alvida as unbeatable.
